name: Tropical Fruit Champagne Granita
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the sugar and water. Bring to a boil over medium heat and stir until the sugar is completely dissolved. Allow the syrup to cool.
2. In a blender or food processor, puree the pineapple chunks with 1/4 cup plus 2 tablespoons of the cooled syrup (reserve the remaining syrup for another use). Stir in the passion fruit juice and Champagne.
3. Pour the mixture into a shallow metal baking pan. Place in the freezer and stir every hour with a fork to crush any ice crystals, until the mixture is firm but not frozen hard, about 3 to 4 hours. The granita can be made up to 2 days ahead and stored covered in the freezer.
4. Just before serving, scrape the granita into bowls using a fork to achieve a lighter texture.
